title: White House rejects conflict-of-interest concerns as Trump’s crypto earnings soar – US politics live
summary_full: White House says president has ‘proudly made the US the crypto capital of the world’Sign up for US breaking news alerts emailDonald Trump will attend a ribbon cutting for the new Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library on Wednesday, touting the legacy of a president his own administration is attempting to destroy, critics say.While in office from 1901 to 1909, Roosevelt established five new national parks, protected swaths of land and passed legislation enabling himself and future presidents to proclaim historic landmarks and other objects of historic or scientific interest in federal ownership as national monuments.
